levelList.name: 无尽慶典
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>使用了守備技能，則其不会受到<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
[WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>生成1个座艙

levelList.name: 永恒慶典
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>使用了守備技能，則其不会受到<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
[WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>生成4个座艙

levelList.name: 餓火焚身
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>每消耗100層[BloodDinner]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WhenUse] 消耗最多30層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[RegainedStrength]
[DefeatDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去3点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Laceration]強度并対其施加2層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 被刺穿叭
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗最多40層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[RegainedStrength]并恢復3点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

[DefeatDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去3点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限20%的<color=#FE6E00>色欲</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限20%的<color=#FE6E00>色欲</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血2式-粧
levelList.desc:
優先指定[Laceration]最多的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>每消耗100層[BloodDinner]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有5級[Laceration]強度，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加2級[Laceration]強度并対其施加2層[Laceration]
[OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成(其[Laceration]強度×[Laceration]層数)点<color=#FE6E00>色欲</color><color=#ffffff>傷害</color>

levelList.name: 硬血楔
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>每消耗100層[BloodDinner]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[StartBattle] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有3層[RegainedStrength]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+2)
[EndSkill] 消耗3層[RegainedStrength]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Laceration]強度并対其施加3層[Laceration]

levelList.name: 血之欲望
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗最多40層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[RegainedStrength]并恢復5点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有5層[RegainedStrength]，令本技能額外施加1層[Laceration](最多額外施加2層)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%

levelList.name: 血宴時刻
levelList.desc:
[CantIdentify]
[WhenUse] 消耗最多300層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[RegainedStrength]并恢復3点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[WhenUse] 若消耗了[BloodDinner]，則使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復30点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血4式-剖除
levelList.desc:
直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱。
[WhenUse] 消耗最多100層[BloodDinner]，每消耗10層[BloodDinner]，使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[RegainedStrength]并恢復15点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有30層[BloodDinner_Accumulation]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1(最多+15)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱。
[EndSkill] <color=#7C5738>本回合</color>与<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加層数相当于本技能増加的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>的[AttackDown]与[DefenseDown]。(最多15層)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血14式披風
levelList.desc:
<color=#ffffff>自身</color>每消耗100層[BloodDinner]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>基礎威力</color>+1(最多+10)
[DuelGuard]
[WinDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加4級[Laceration]強度与4級[Burst]強度
[DefeatDuel] 消耗2層[RegainedStrength]

levelList.name: 脆弱，脆弱不堪

[CantDuel]

levelList.name: 被貫穿叭
levelList.desc:
[DefeatDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去3点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱并在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対其施加[Penetration]

levelList.name: 堂吉訶德派硬血奥義-球
levelList.desc:
直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱。
根据[BloodDinner_Common_Accumulation]層数，相應使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>増加(最多+300%)
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復30点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>每帯有10層[RegainedStrength]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+1
[EndSkill] 消耗所有[RegainedStrength]，<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>与<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加5層[Vulnerable]，并在<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[Binding]。
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%

levelList.name: 執拗致傷

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 触発<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]1次(使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]層数減少1層)

levelList.name: 飢渴的荊棘
levelList.desc: [StartBattle] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得3層[AttackDmgUp]并対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[Vulnerable]

levelList.name: 止不住的血
levelList.desc:
[DuelCounter]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 触発<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]1次，并立即消耗該[Laceration]<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>生成的[BloodDinner]

levelList.name: 沈溺于養分
levelList.desc:
[BloodDinner]層数不低于100層時使用
[EndBattle] 消耗最多100層[BloodDinner]并触発以下效果
- 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>本体与躯干<color=#ffffff>部位</color>恢復相当于消耗的[BloodDinner]層数的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
- 每消耗20層[BloodDinner]，<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得1層[AttackUp]

levelList.name: 渴望的棘蔓
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 消耗最多100層[BloodDinner]并触発以下效果
- 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>本体与躯干<color=#ffffff>部位</color>恢復相当于消耗的[BloodDinner]層数的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
- 每消耗20層[BloodDinner]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1
[EndSkill] 若本技能消耗的[BloodDinner]層数低于30層，則<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[Vulnerable]

levelList.name: 回答我，賈宝玉
levelList.desc:
[CantChangeTarget]
優先指定最先編入的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
[WinDuel] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加4層[Burst]
[DefeatDuel] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>最先編入，則使其獲得1層[Teaching]

levelList.name: 天罡星-格
levelList.desc:
優先指定最先編入的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>每帯有1層[Teaching]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>-2
[DefeatDuel] 本技能攻撃不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱。本場戦斗期間対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加24層[DefenseDown]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Burst]強度与[Burst]層数之和每有1点，使本硬幣造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+5%(最多+100%)

levelList.name: 宝玉揺籃
levelList.desc:
[CantChangeTarget]
優先指定最先編入的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>最先編入，則使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>固定為0点
[EndSkill] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>最先編入，則使其陷入混乱，<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使其変為[ExpensiveJade]。随后結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

levelList.name: 風卷残云
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
[CantChangeTarget]
本技能攻撃最先編入的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>以外的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使用黑獣 - 卯使除最先編入的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>以外的<color=#ffffff>全体</color>人格陷入混乱，并解除<color=#ffffff>自身</color>的混乱
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

levelList.name: 尓等尚不知那眼瞳之力与奇特之処叭
levelList.desc:
優先指定最先編入的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
[WhenUse] 若宝玉在場，則使本技能的所有硬幣轉化為[SuperCoin]
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]与[Burst]強度之和每有5級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+2)

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加1級[Laceration]強度与1級[Burst]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加1級[Laceration]強度与1級[Burst]強度

levelList.name: 仙人啊，請注視吾叭…！
levelList.desc:
優先指定最先編入的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
[WinDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>増加5級[Breath]強度并使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[Breath]
[DefeatDuel] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>獲得2層[AttackUp]并対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[DefenseDown]

levelList.name: 汝依旧无能為力
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復8点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[WhenUse] 若主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于50%，或主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Burst]与[Laceration]強度之和不低于10級，則使本技能的所有硬幣轉化為[SuperCoin]
[DefeatDuel] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加1層[Vulnerable]
- 与鴻璐拼点失敗時，改為施加2層

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加4級[Laceration]強度与4級[Burst]強度
[OnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>造成10点理智<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>并使其<color=#ffffff>混乱閾値</color>前移本硬幣<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的50%

levelList.name: 爆碎斬
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[Prey]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度之和每有6級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加4級[Vibration]強度并対其施加4層[Vibration]
若本<color=#ffffff>硬幣效果</color>消耗了[BulletPropellant]，則使本硬幣造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+50%
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Combustion]強度并対其施加3層[Combustion]
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]2次，并使其[Vibration]層数減少2層

levelList.name: 快刀乱麻
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[Prey]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点。直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱
[WhenUse] 消耗所有[BattleSense]，若消耗的[BattleSense]層数
- 不低于10層，則每消耗10層，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+2)
- 為25層，則主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度之和每有4級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[DefeatDuel]  使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱，令本技能増加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度与施加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]層数減半(不包括其他效果増加的施加量)
[EndSkill] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[FullReload](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有[BulletPropellantSpecial]，則改為使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[ReloadKeepAmmo](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 根据消耗的[BulletPropellant]層数，使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加相應的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度并対其施加相應層数的[Combustion]与[Vibration]
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]3次，并使其[Vibration]層数減少3層

levelList.name: 超絶猛虎殺撃乱斬
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[Prey]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点。直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱
[WhenUse] 消耗所有[BattleSense]，若消耗的[BattleSense]層数
- 不低于10層，則每消耗10層，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+4)
- 不低于25層，則主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度之和每有4級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+6)
- 為50層，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1，造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+50%
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱，令本技能増加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度与施加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]層数減半(不包括其他效果増加的施加量)
[EndSkill] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[FullReload](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有[BulletPropellantSpecial]，則改為使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[ReloadKeepAmmo](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的最終<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]5次，并使其[Vibration]層数減少5層
